General.Name: Classover Holdings, Inc. Class B Common Stock
General.Description: Classover Holdings, Inc., a technology-driven education company, operates an online enrichment class platform for children aged 4 to 17. Its platform offers various enrichment programs, including language, science, technology, engineering, arts, mathematics, music, and others. The company was founded in 2020 and is headquartered in New York, New York.
General.Address: 450 7th Avenue, New York, NY, United States, 10123
